title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 508.160 - Pleadings to be made up before award of change of venue
text:
508.160.  Pleadings to be made up before award of change of venue. — In all cases of application for a change of venue, all pleadings shall be filed and the issues made up before the entry awarding the change is made; but after the change of venue, any pleading found insufficient upon demurrer or otherwise may be amended as in other cases.
(RSMo 1939 § 1064, A.L. 1957 p. 294) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 913; 1919 § 1363; 1909 § 1933
